caption: Arielle, neon‑lit rebel, slides through the rain‑slick streets of the flooded city, her silhouette pulsing with holographic glow. She wears daring minimal armor, accentuating her curves, as she captures the night with an electric pulse. The camera frames her in a 35mm tilt‑shift perspective, lighting teal‑magenta splashes, framing neon signs, slick wet pavement, and hovering drones. ⚡💫 #cyberpunk #futurism #streetfashion #digitalart #neonaesthetics
